label: Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning

node.label: Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning
node.definition: Populations of candidate solutions are selected, mutated, recombined, or coordinated without gradient requirements.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning is to connect Optimization theory, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including AutoML & automated model design, Neural architecture search.
examples: substrate for AutoML & automated model design
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Optimization theory, Probability theory.

dependencies.rationale: Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning uses Game theory & decision theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
